title: Gro-sure Fibre Pots Square 6cm 20pk Propagation kit, Brown
features: made from peat free, biodegradable wood pulp
Ideal for seeds, seedlings and cuttings
Reduces root disturbance - simply plant straight into the ground
Promotes stronger, healthier plants by minimal disruption
description: From the manufacturer Gro-Sure Fibre Pots Square Gro-Sure square Fibre Pots are ideal for growing healthy plants from seed and cuttings with no root disturbance, planting pots straight into the ground. Key Benefits 100% natural wood fibre Reduces root disturbance - simply plant straight into the ground Certified organic and peat free Sourced responsibly from PEFC managed forests Why choose Gro-Sure Fibre Pots? Made from 100% natural wood pulp and with no chemical additives, these pots are suitable for organic gardening. Perfect for growing without the use of plastic plant pots. The roots naturally grow through the fibre pot nurturing a healthy root system and can be planted directly into the soil. This prevents any root disturbance and saves time potting up as the plants grow. Fibre root pots are naturally peat free. Plastic Free Packaging The Gro-Sure Fibre root pots are now available in plastic free packaging. All packaging Is fully recyclable at home. How to use Place the fibre pots in a growing tray and fill them with seed and cutting compost. Plant your seeds and water. When your plants are ready, plant the fibre pot straight into the ground so you do not disturb the roots. The fibre pot will then biodegrade into the soil. Gro-Sure Fibre root pots are certified organic and peat free. Made from 100% natural wood fibre. Sourced responsibly from PEFC managed forests.
